text: Moving from the sterile quietude of the glass-walled meeting room to the vibrant display of the R+D exhibition, a shift occurs within me. The first scene felt clinical and expectant, a stage set for collaboration yet empty, full of unrealized potential. Here, in this new space, I am enveloped by color and concept. The exhibition demands reflection: I am invited to question the intersections of human creativity and technology. I feel enlivened, provoked to think, yet at ease—a sense of belonging in this environment that values inquiry and ingenuity.
